label: Creep joiner aggressive
description: Defines the action taken when a creep joiner pawn turns hostile after joining the colony. Inherits selection-weight and compatibility fields from CreepJoinerBaseDef.

hasMessage.label: Has message
hasMessage.description: When true, a message is shown to the player when this aggressive action triggers.

message.label: Message
message.description: Message shown to the player when this aggressive action triggers. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

hasLetter.label: Has letter
hasLetter.description: When true, a letter is sent to the player when this aggressive action triggers. Requires letterLabel, letterDesc, and letterDef.

letterLabel.label: Letter label
letterLabel.description: Title of the letter sent when this aggressive action triggers. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterDesc.label: Letter description
letterDesc.description: Body text of the letter sent when this aggressive action triggers. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

letterDef.label: Letter def
letterDef.description: LetterDef controlling the letter type (icon, sound, and pin behavior) used when this aggressive action triggers.

workerType.label: Worker type
workerType.description: C# class deriving from BaseCreepJoinerWorker that executes this aggressive action when triggered.
